options.blogdescription: Experience the power of realistic ecommerce data generation with v2.1.1 enhancements

steps.code:
<?php
// Create demo user with appropriate capabilities
$user_id = wp_create_user('demo', 'demo123', 'demo@example.com');
if (!is_wp_error($user_id)) {
    $user = new WP_User($user_id);
    $user->set_role('administrator');
    wp_update_user([
        'ID' => $user_id,
        'first_name' => 'Demo',
        'last_name' => 'User',
        'display_name' => 'Demo User',
        'description' => 'Demo user for EasyCommerce FakerPress testing'
    ]);
}

// Set up basic EasyCommerce configuration if available
if (defined('EASYCOMMERCE_VERSION')) {
    // Basic store settings
    update_option('easycommerce_store_address', '123 Demo Street');
    update_option('easycommerce_store_city', 'Demo City');
    update_option('easycommerce_default_country', 'US:CA');
    update_option('easycommerce_store_postcode', '90210');
    update_option('easycommerce_currency', 'USD');
    update_option('easycommerce_currency_pos', 'left');
    update_option('easycommerce_price_decimal_sep', '.');
    update_option('easycommerce_price_thousand_sep', ',');
    update_option('easycommerce_price_num_decimals', '2');
    
    // Enable key features
    update_option('easycommerce_manage_stock', 'yes');
    update_option('easycommerce_enable_reviews', 'yes');
    update_option('easycommerce_enable_coupons', 'yes');
    
    // Tax settings
    update_option('easycommerce_calc_taxes', 'yes');
    update_option('easycommerce_prices_include_tax', 'no');
    update_option('easycommerce_tax_based_on', 'shipping');
    
    // Shipping settings
    update_option('easycommerce_ship_to_countries', 'all');
    update_option('easycommerce_enable_shipping_calc', 'yes');
}

echo 'Demo environment configured successfully!';

<?php
// Create sample pages for ecommerce
$pages = [
    'shop' => [
        'title' => 'Shop',
        'content' => '[easycommerce_products limit="12" columns="3"]',
        'slug' => 'shop'
    ],
    'cart' => [
        'title' => 'Cart',
        'content' => '[easycommerce_cart]',
        'slug' => 'cart'
    ],
    'checkout' => [
        'title' => 'Checkout',
        'content' => '[easycommerce_checkout]',
        'slug' => 'checkout'
    ],
    'my-account' => [
        'title' => 'My Account',
        'content' => '[easycommerce_my_account]',
        'slug' => 'my-account'
    ]
];

foreach ($pages as $key => $page) {
    $existing_page = get_page_by_path($page['slug']);
    if (!$existing_page) {
        $page_id = wp_insert_post([
            'post_title' => $page['title'],
            'post_content' => $page['content'],
            'post_status' => 'publish',
            'post_type' => 'page',
            'post_name' => $page['slug']
        ]);
        
        if ($page_id && !is_wp_error($page_id)) {
            if ($key === 'shop') {
                update_option('easycommerce_shop_page_id', $page_id);
            } elseif ($key === 'cart') {
                update_option('easycommerce_cart_page_id', $page_id);
            } elseif ($key === 'checkout') {
                update_option('easycommerce_checkout_page_id', $page_id);
            } elseif ($key === 'my-account') {
                update_option('easycommerce_myaccount_page_id', $page_id);
            }
        }
    }
}

echo 'EasyCommerce pages created successfully!';

<?php
// Create some basic product categories and attributes for demonstration
if (function_exists('wp_insert_term') && taxonomy_exists('product_cat')) {
    // Product categories
    $categories = [
        'Electronics' => 'High-tech gadgets and devices',
        'Clothing' => 'Fashion and apparel for all occasions',
        'Home & Garden' => 'Everything for your home and outdoor spaces',
        'Sports & Fitness' => 'Gear for active lifestyles',
        'Books & Media' => 'Literature, movies, and digital content'
    ];
    
    foreach ($categories as $name => $description) {
        $existing = term_exists($name, 'product_cat');
        if (!$existing) {
            $term = wp_insert_term($name, 'product_cat', [
                'description' => $description,
                'slug' => sanitize_title($name)
            ]);
        }
    }
    
    // Product tags
    $tags = ['Popular', 'New Arrival', 'Best Seller', 'On Sale', 'Featured'];
    foreach ($tags as $tag) {
        $existing = term_exists($tag, 'product_tag');
        if (!$existing) {
            wp_insert_term($tag, 'product_tag', [
                'slug' => sanitize_title($tag)
            ]);
        }
    }
}

echo 'Basic product taxonomies created!';

<?php
// Add welcome notice and helpful tips
update_option('easycommerce_fakerpress_demo_notice', [
    'type' => 'info',
    'message' => 'Welcome to EasyCommerce FakerPress Demo v2.1.1! This environment is pre-configured with EasyCommerce plugin and sample data structures. Visit the FakerPress admin page to start generating realistic ecommerce data, including enhanced shipping plans with quantity-based calculations and improved regional coverage.',
    'dismissible' => true
]);

// Set up demo-friendly admin settings
update_option('show_on_front', 'posts');
update_option('posts_per_page', 10);
update_option('default_comment_status', 'open');
update_option('default_ping_status', 'open');

// Create a sample menu
$menu_id = wp_create_nav_menu('Main Menu');
if (!is_wp_error($menu_id) && $menu_id) {
    // Add pages to menu
    $pages = ['shop', 'cart', 'checkout', 'my-account'];
    $menu_order = 1;
    
    foreach ($pages as $page_slug) {
        $page = get_page_by_path($page_slug);
        if ($page) {
            wp_update_nav_menu_item($menu_id, 0, [
                'menu-item-title' => $page->post_title,
                'menu-item-object' => 'page',
                'menu-item-object-id' => $page->ID,
                'menu-item-type' => 'post_type',
                'menu-item-status' => 'publish',
                'menu-item-position' => $menu_order++
            ]);
        }
    }
    
    // Assign menu to primary location
    $locations = get_theme_mod('nav_menu_locations', []);
    $locations['primary'] = $menu_id;
    set_theme_mod('nav_menu_locations', $locations);
}

// Generate sample shipping plans using FakerPress if available
define('ABSPATH', true); // Ensure WP is loaded
if (class_exists('EasyCommerceFakerPress\Generators\Shipping_Plan')) {
    require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-content/plugins/easycommerce-fakerpress/includes/Abstracts/Generator.php';
    $generator = new EasyCommerceFakerPress\Generators\Shipping_Plan();
    $results = $generator->generate_multiple(3, []);
    if (!empty($results)) {
        update_option('easycommerce_fakerpress_sample_shipping_plans', $results);
        echo 'Sample shipping plans generated! ';
    }
}

echo 'Demo environment fully configured! Ready for EasyCommerce FakerPress testing.';

meta.title: EasyCommerce FakerPress Demo v2.1.1
meta.description: Experience the comprehensive EasyCommerce FakerPress plugin with 10 specialized data generators, modern React interface, and realistic ecommerce data generation, featuring enhanced shipping plan capabilities.
meta.author: Al Amin Ahamed
